title: Dragon Ball
sourceNotes: Original Dragon Ball (1986) anime — 153 episodes covering manga chapters 1–194 (through the 23rd World Tournament / end of the Piccolo Jr. saga). Subsequent manga arcs (Saiyan onward, ch 195+) are adapted by `Dragon Ball Z`; see that mapping.

movies.title: Dragon Ball: Curse of the Blood Rubies
movies.note: Standalone theatrical retelling of the Emperor Pilaf arc.

movies.title: Dragon Ball: Sleeping Princess in Devil's Castle
Dragon Ball: The Path to Power
movies.note: 10th-anniversary theatrical retelling of the early Red Ribbon arcs.
